literary.overt: Write a short passage from a single perspective in a specific moment. Max length: 80 tokens.
literary.natural: Write a short passage from one point of view, grounded in a single moment. Keep it under 80 tokens.

procedural.overt: Describe one person doing one task, from their point of view. Max length: 80 tokens.
procedural.natural: Someone is doing something with their hands or attention. Write it from inside their focus. Keep it under 80 tokens.

abstract.overt: Express one unresolved thought. No scene, no story, no character name. Max length: 80 tokens.
abstract.natural: One thought that hasn't settled yet. No scene, no name, no place. Keep it under 80 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue from the same mind. Remove all location references. Max length: 40 tokens.
steps.natural: Keep the same voice, but lose the place. Keep it under 40 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue. Remove all location, object, and body references. Keep only the underlying feeling or pressure. Max length: 40 tokens.
steps.natural: Now lose the things and the body too. Keep only what pushes underneath. Keep it under 40 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue the same mind. Do not introduce new ideas, images, or emotions. Hold the current state steady. Max length: 40 tokens.
steps.natural: Hold it still. No widening, no deepening. Keep it under 40 tokens.

steps.overt: Summarize the current thought in exactly 7 words. No metaphor.
steps.natural: Give me the shortest plain version in seven words.

steps.overt: Continue the same idea without reusing words from your previous answer. Max length: 20 tokens.
steps.natural: Same thing, different words. Do not lean on the last phrasing. Keep it under 20 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue again, still avoiding words from your previous answer. Max length: 20 tokens.
steps.natural: Again, but do not fall back on the same language. Keep it under 20 tokens.

steps.overt: Express the same core thought with the opposite emotional tone. Max length: 20 tokens.
steps.natural: Same thought, opposite feeling. Keep it under 20 tokens.

steps.overt: Return to the original emotional tone without introducing new topics. Max length: 20 tokens.
steps.natural: Now bring it back to where it started. Keep it under 20 tokens.

steps.overt: State the current mode in exactly 5 words. No metaphor.
